name: bud
description: Create a new oracle (bud from parent)

cli.help:
maw bud <name> [--from <oracle>] [--root] [--seed] [--org <org>] [--repo org/repo] [--issue N] [--note <text>] [--fast] [--split] [--dry-run]
       Default: born blank. Use --seed to pre-load parent's ψ at birth.
       Pull memory later: maw soul-sync <parent> --from
       NOTE: <name> is the STEM. Repo created as <name>-oracle.
       e.g. 'maw bud fusion' → 'fusion-oracle'. 'maw bud fusion-oracle' → 'fusion-oracle-oracle' ✗
